title: Twilight Iris Xe Fix
description: Fix Aurora Shader crash on Iris Xe drivers For 1.20.x.
body:
# Twilight Iris Xe Fix

<details><summary>English</summary>

When running The Twilight Forest on devices equipped with Intel Iris Xe integrated graphics, the game may crash shortly after launching. This is a known [Intel graphics driver compatibility issue](https://github.com/TeamTwilight/twilightforest/issues/2496).

The Twilight development team has [fixed this issue](https://github.com/TeamTwilight/twilightforest/commit/bdbc5c9018ca84421623247abee2c755465c5fb4) in version 1.21.1, but since many mod packs are still on version 1.20.1, this project provides a backported fix.

## How It Works

This fix is essentially a shader resource pack; players can resolve compatibility issues by manually loading the resource pack.

However, since the game may not even launch properly in affected environments, players often cannot conveniently load the resource pack manually. Therefore, this project packages the fix as a mod consisting solely of a resource pack, allowing Forge to automatically load and apply the fix during the launch phase.

Additionally, if your game doesn't have this issue, nothing will happen after you install this mod.
</details>

<details><summary>中文</summary>

在搭载 Intel Iris Xe 集成显卡的设备上运行 The Twilight Forest 时，可能会出现游戏启动后崩溃的问题，这是一个已知的 [Intel 图形驱动兼容性问题](https://github.com/TeamTwilight/twilightforest/issues/2496)。

Twilight 的开发团队已在 1.21.1 版本中[修复该问题](https://github.com/TeamTwilight/twilightforest/commit/bdbc5c9018ca84421623247abee2c755465c5fb4)，但由于大量整合包仍停留在 1.20.1，因此本项目提供了一个反向移植修复方案。

## 工作原理

该修复本质上是一个着色器资源包，玩家可以通过直接手动加载资源包来解决兼容性问题。

但由于在受影响环境下游戏甚至无法正常启动，玩家通常无法方便的手动加载资源包，因此本项目将修复内容封装为了仅资源包形式的 Mod，使 Forge 能在启动阶段自动加载并应用修复。

此外，如果你的游戏并没有遇到这个问题，安装这个 Mod 后什么也不会发生。
</details>
